text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's the day of the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: What even is this lineup?! It's magnificent!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Well, it is a grand prix, just like the Arima. Still, the field does strike me as especially exciting.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: You-know-who is running, after all.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Hey, Jordan. So you're running too.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hm? ...Nakayama?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, you're here too! Hey, classmate! ☆

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: ...I see you haven't gotten any more serious. But man... to think you'd show up to face me at the Takarazuka.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
And after running the other two legs of the Senior
Spring, no less. Is it recognition you're after? To
prove that you stand at the top of your class?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Or a ticket to the top of the world itself, a world
that other heroes of your class are already
beginning to make their mark on?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Go on, tell me. What brings you here to play with
the high rollers?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uh, I heard Golshi was gonna be running.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: ...That's it?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uh, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Pfft. Haha! That's it? You know, you are...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: You are a bigger dummy than I ever imagined.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Rrrgh... Hmph!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Haha, so you don't deny it? ...Or maybe that's
what you wanted all along.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Coming out of nowhere to throw off all the odds,
huh. I wonder how the dice will land this time.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Either way, I don't plan on giving up.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Teach told me to win, after all.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Everything Nakayama says is always so confusing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Like Nakayama Festa said, there are a lot of
top-tier runners here besides Gold Ship.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When it comes to the level of competition, fans
obviously have grand expectations for the spring
grand prix. However...
choice_data_list:
Forget about the difficult stuff and just focus on
the race.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Facts. Screw thinking!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'm just gonna go kick some butt. So you sit back,
relax, and watch me become the greatest ever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that there is her strength. She keeps it
simple, draws a straight line to her goals and
never strays.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hey, am I... cool?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Haha... Shut up! All right, here I go!
